subject: Re: referral pipeline, Silvana
draft:
Silvana,

Completely understand - team buy-in matters. Just to clarify though: we handle the outreach legwork so your team can focus on what they do best (patient care and relationships). Nothing replaces the relationships you're building.

Happy to chat through how this actually works whenever the timing feels right.

https://calendly.com/vito-argusreach/30min

Vito Resciniti
Founder, ArgusReach
